---
title: "Upcoming Events"
page-layout: full
body-classes: events-page
---

## Professional Events

::: {.event-grid}

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Study Sessions

**Every Thursday in Spring 2026 Semester | 01:00 – 03:00 PM**  
**Location:** 120 Fogler Library  

Open to graduate students and undergraduates (Chi Epsilon, ASCE). Study sessions will include FE prep, homework review, and exam preparation.

[View Flyer](Images/Flyers/Study Session V2.png){.flyer-btn}
:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Geo-Congress Conference 2026

**March 9, 2026 | 08:00 AM - 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** Salt Lake City, Utah, USA

Description of this event.

:::

::: {.event-card .in-progress}

### Drone Training Workshop

**Tentative Timeline: April–May 2026**
**Location:** University Mall, University of Maine  

Technical seminar on drone applications in geotechnical and coastal engineering will be held 4 weeks prior to the flying workshop. GSO and COPRI will coordinate licensing for participants.

[View Flyer](Images/Flyers/Study Session V2.png){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Liquefaction Tank

**Completion by May 2026**  
**Location:** Advanced Geotechnical Lab, Boardman Hall, University of Maine  

Final construction and demonstration planning underway.

:::

::: {.event-card .in-progress}

### Data Analysis Workshop

**September 18, 2026 | 01:00 – 03:00 PM**  
**Location:** 312 Boardman Hall, University of Maine  

Data analysis session (1–3 PM). Potential collaboration with S.W. Cole and integration with CE 460.

[View Flyer](Images/Flyers/Study Session V2.png){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .in-progress}

### Faculty Interview Series

Spotlight featuring faculty and their research groups. 

To be shared on website and social media.

[View Article](Images/Flyers/Study Session V2.png){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .in-progress}

### GSO Website Development

Ongoing improvements. Member input and design suggestions welcome.

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### CIE Department New Member Seminar

**February 4, 2026 | 03:30 – 05:00 PM**  
**Location:** 115 Boardman Hall 

Description of this event.

[View Flyer](Images/Flyers/CIE New Member Seminar.pdf){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Geotechnical Frontiers 2025

**March 2-5, 2025 | 09:00 AM - 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** Kentucky International Convention Center

Description of this event.

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Engineering Expo 2025

**March 8, 2025 | 09:00 AM - 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** New Balance Center, University of Maine

Description of this event.

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Geo-Conneticut Conference 2024

**September 26, 2025 | 09:00 AM - 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** Sheraton Hartford South, Rocky Hill, Connecticut

Description of this event.

[View Article](https://www.readgeo.com/geostrata/december_2024_january_2025/MobilePagedArticle.action?articleId=2026615#articleId2026615){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Geo-Congress Conference 2024

**February 25-27, 2024 | 08:00 AM - 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada

Description of this event.

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Company Recruiter Visit

**October 18, 2023 | 11:00 – 12:00 PM**  
**Location:** 310 Boardman Hall 

Description of this event.

[View Agenda](Images/Flyers/RecruiterAgenda.pdf){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### International Geo-Talks Seminar

**October 2023 through January 2024**  
**Location:** In person and online

Description of this event.

[View Flyer](Images/Flyers/International Talk.jpg){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### GEOSTRATA Interview with Dr. Patricia Culligan

**July 7, 2023 | 10:00 - 12:00 PM**  
**Published in GEOSTRATA magazine** 

Description of this event.

[View Article](https://www.readgeo.com/geostrata/june_july_2024/MobilePagedArticle.action?articleId=1982926&app=false&cmsId=4199715#articleId1982926){.flyer-btn}

:::

:::

---

## Social Events

::: {.event-grid}

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### GSO XC Ski Day

**February 20, 2026 | 2:30 PM**  
**Location:** Rec Center Trails, University of Maine  

Rental: $10  

[View Flyer](Images/Flyers/XC-Skiing.png){.flyer-btn}

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### February Happy Hour

**February 20, 2026 | 04:30 PM**  
**Location:** 2 Hammond Street Canal Side, Bangor, ME  

Monthly happy hour at Barliman's in Bangor.

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### March Happy Hour

**March 20, 2026 | 04:30 PM**  
**Location:** 31 Main St, Orono, ME 04473  

Monthly happy hour at Woodman's Bar and Grill in downtown Orono.

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### April Happy Hour

**April 24, 2026 | 04:30 PM**  
**Location:** 11 Central St, Bangor, ME 04401  

Monthly happy hour at 11 Central in Bangor.

:::

::: {.event-card .in-progress}

### CIE End of Year Celebration

**May 15, 2026 | 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** University Mall in front of Boardman Hall, University of Maine  

Collaboration with ASCE, CIE Department, COPRI, and Chi Epsilon.

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Hike & Lunch in Acadia

**May 23, 2026 | 10:00 AM**  
**Location:** Seal Harbor, ME 04675  

Jordan Pond trail head and doing the Jordan Pond loop followed by lunch at Jordan Pond House.

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Pushaw Dam Paddling

**June 20, 2026 | 10:00 AM**  
**Location:** Hirundo Wildlife Refuge, Old Town, ME  

Group paddle to Pushaw Dam and social gathering.

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Beach Day

**July 24, 2026 | 09:00 AM**  
**Location:** Ogunquit Beach  

Day trip to Ogunquit Beach. Optional overnight stay depending on group interest.

:::

::: {.event-card .confirmed}

### Treworgy Family Orchard

**August 15, 2026 | 10:00 AM**  
**Location:** 3876 Union St, Levant, ME 04456  

Visit to Treworgy orchards including seasonal activities and corn maze.

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Graduation Social

**May 10, 2025 | 01:00 PM**  
**Location:** Shared with attendees.

Description of the event

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Graduation Social

**April 20, 2024 | 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** Shared with attendees.

Description of the event

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### CIE End of Year Celebration

**April 15, 2023 | 04:00 PM**  
**Location:** University Mall in front of Boardman Hall, University of Maine  

Collaboration with ASCE, CIE Department, COPRI, and Chi Epsilon.

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Opening BBQ Event

**April 7, 2023 | 05:30 PM**  
**Location:** The Avenue at Orono Club House  

Description of the event

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Spring BBQ

**April 7, 2023 | 05:30 PM**  
**Location:** The Avenue at Orono Club House  

Description of the event

:::

::: {.event-card .completed}

### Fall BBQ 

**October 10, 2022 | 10:00 AM**  
**Location:** Shared with attendees.

Description of the event

:::

:::

---

## Subscribe to Our Event Calendar

Stay updated by subscribing to our shared GSO calendar.

[Subscribe Here](calendar.html){.learn-btn}
